resposta:
```python
class LUPrefix:

    def __init__(self, n: int):
        self.uploaded = [False] * (n + 1)
        self.longest_prefix = 0

    def upload(self, video: int) -> None:
        self.uploaded[video] = True
        while self.uploaded[self.longest_prefix + 1]:
            self.longest_prefix += 1

    def longest(self) -> int:
        return self.longest_prefix


# Your LUPrefix object will be instantiated and called as such:
# obj = LUPrefix(n)
# obj.upload(video)
# param_2 = obj.longest()
```
solution: 
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution utilizes a boolean array to track uploaded videos and a variable to store the length of the longest uploaded prefix, updating the prefix length whenever a new video is uploaded and all previous videos have been uploaded.
